title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a small core architecture that supports read, write, edit, and bash operations. It allows custom extensions via npm and git, and is compatible with multiple language models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6.
